creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
A commit in branch main omitted the PR: prefix when referencing this bug report. 

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-doc/commit/3347f0b50b335ca93281f46a68550944e6c3bf82>

Handbook: Internet resources: list archives

Make the FreeBSD-provided search interface primary.

Add MarkMail.
